title: ClariExportJob
description: Represents the status and metadata of an asynchronous export job in the Clari API.

jobId.description: Unique identifier for the export job.

userId.description: Clari user ID of the user that initiated the job.

orgId.description: Clari org ID of the organization that requested the export.

status.description: Current state of the export job.

type.description: The category of export job (e.g., forecast, activity, audit).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job was last updated.
